title: Xtra Crispy Algerian Bacon Skewers
description: A fresh and aerated Algerian dish featuring crispy bacon, a sweet glaze, and a Buddhist-temple-friendly vibe, served on a tagliere for a perfect brunch mood. This recipe combines the flavors of Algeria with the convenience of a skewer.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the bacon slices in half and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, soy sauce, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the glaze.
Thread 2-3 pieces of bacon onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the glaze evenly onto each skewer, making sure the bacon is fully coated.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers on a tagliere and enjoy.
Garnish with fresh herbs or lemon wedges, if desired.
